Generated by gi-docgen 2023.3

Struct

WPEPlatformBufferFormatsBuilder

since: 2.0

Description [src] 

struct WPEBufferFormatsBuilder {
  /* No available fields */
}

Helper type to build a WPEBufferFormats.

Available since: 2.0

Constructors

wpe_buffer_formats_builder_new

Create a new WPEBufferFormatsBuilder.

since: 2.0

Instance methods

wpe_buffer_formats_builder_append_format

Append a new pair of format and modifier to the last group added to builder.

since: 2.0

wpe_buffer_formats_builder_append_group

Append a new group for device and usage to builder. If device is NULL, the main device passed to wpe_buffer_formats_builder_new() should be used.

since: 2.0

wpe_buffer_formats_builder_end

End the builder process and return the constructed WPEBufferFormats. This function calls wpe_buffer_formats_builder_unref() on builder.

since: 2.0

wpe_buffer_formats_builder_ref

Atomically acquires a reference on the given builder.

since: 2.0

wpe_buffer_formats_builder_unref

Atomically releases a reference on the given builder.

since: 2.0
